rngHeroesCodes.title: RNG Heroes Codes
rngHeroesCodes.intro: Codes provide useful early-game rewards that reduce the amount of rolling and enemy farming needed at the start. Enter every code with the exact capitalization shown and redeem it once per Roblox account.
rngHeroesCodes.noExpiredNote: No expired codes yet. The release code list currently has no expired entries.

redeemSteps: Select the Shop button on the right side of the screen.
Press Redeem to collect the rewards.
troubleshooting: Remove any spaces before or after the code.
Check the capital B in Beginnings.
A code cannot be redeemed twice on the same account.
Rejoin the game before retrying a newly released code.

beginnerProgression.title: RNG Heroes Beginner Progression Guide
beginnerProgression.intro: The main progression loop is to roll heroes, equip the strongest available lineup, defeat monsters, collect Gold and XP, purchase upgrades, and move into harder areas. Prioritize upgrades that help your current team clear enemies without slowing down your hero rolls.

steps.title: Complete the Tutorial
steps.description: Finish every tutorial prompt to learn rolling and combat. Completing the tutorial also unlocks the Shop menu used to redeem codes.

steps.title: Claim the Beginnings Code
steps.description: Open the Shop, scroll to the Codes section, and redeem Beginnings for 10,000 Gold and an Assassin Hero. Equip the Assassin immediately for a faster early start.

steps.title: Roll and Equip Heroes
steps.description: The Warrior is a common 1-in-2 roll and works as a basic starter. Keep rolling and replace common heroes whenever a new hero provides higher displayed combat power.

steps.title: Farm the First Area
steps.description: Defeat the available monsters to collect Gold and XP drops. Stay in the current area until your equipped heroes can defeat its enemies quickly and consistently.

steps.title: Buy Useful Upgrades
steps.description: Spend Gold on Luck, Gold Drop, XP Drop, and Combat Damage. Luck improves hero progression, while the other upgrades increase farming speed and make stronger areas easier to clear.

steps.title: Unlock New Areas
steps.description: Continue the cycle of rolling, equipping stronger heroes, defeating monsters, and buying upgrades. Enter each new biome after your team can comfortably clear the previous area's enemies.

steps.title: Claim the Group Bonus
steps.description: Like the experience and join the Heroplay Studios Roblox group to receive a permanent Gold and Luck bonus that speeds up every farming and rolling session.

tierList.title: RNG Heroes Tier List
tierList.intro: Equip heroes that provide the highest available damage and replace common starter rolls as stronger characters appear. The free Assassin is the best immediate release reward, while the Warrior mainly serves as an introductory roll.

heroes.name: Assassin
strengths: Provides a major head start over the basic Warrior
Useful for clearing early enemies and earning upgrade Gold
heroes.recommendedUse: Equip immediately after completing the tutorial and keep it active until a stronger rolled hero shows higher combat power.

heroes.name: Higher-Rarity Rolls
heroes.obtainMethod: Roll heroes using the main rolling system
strengths: Higher damage potential than common starter heroes
Better suited to later biomes and stronger monsters
Main source of long-term team upgrades
heroes.recommendedUse: Keep any roll that clearly increases the displayed power of the equipped team.

heroes.name: Mid-Rarity Rolls
strengths: Useful while saving Gold for Luck upgrades
Can fill open team positions during area progression
heroes.recommendedUse: Use as temporary upgrades and replace them when a stronger rarity or higher-damage hero appears.

heroes.name: Warrior
strengths: Suitable for learning the tutorial combat loop
Provides an immediate hero before better rolls are available
heroes.recommendedUse: Use at the beginning, then replace duplicate Warriors with the Assassin or stronger rolled heroes.

rollingLuck.title: RNG Heroes Rolling and Luck Guide
rollingLuck.intro: Luck supports better hero progression, but spending every piece of Gold on it can leave the team too weak to farm efficiently. Balance Luck with Gold Drop, XP Drop, and Combat Damage so that each new area remains fast to clear.

rows.effect: Produces a random hero based on the available rarity odds.
rows.recommendedTiming: Roll whenever the equipped team still contains weak starter heroes or duplicate Warriors.

rows.effect: Improves progression through the hero rarity system and helps players target stronger rolls.
rows.recommendedTiming: Buy Luck while the current team can still clear enemies quickly. Pause Luck spending when combat begins to slow down.

rows.effect: Raises combat performance and reduces the time needed to defeat monsters.
rows.recommendedTiming: Purchase when enemies take too long to defeat or before moving into a harder area.

rows.effect: Increases the Gold gained from fighting enemies, providing more currency for future upgrades.
rows.recommendedTiming: Buy after establishing enough damage to farm continuously without long battles.

rows.effect: Increases XP progression earned from defeated enemies.
rows.recommendedTiming: Invest when level progression becomes slower than area and hero progression.

rows.cost: Like the game and join the Roblox group
rows.effect: Provides a permanent farming and rolling bonus.
rows.recommendedTiming: Claim before beginning a long farming or rolling session.

rows.effect: Provides enough starting Gold for upgrades and awards an Assassin Hero without relying on a rare roll.
rows.recommendedTiming: Redeem immediately after completing the tutorial.

goldFarming.title: RNG Heroes Gold Farming and Upgrades Guide
goldFarming.intro: Gold drives most of the early progression in RNG Heroes. Earn it from monster battles, claim the release code, activate the community bonus, and reinvest it into Luck, additional hero slots, larger heroes, and access to new areas.

rows.requirement: Finish the tutorial and open the Shop
rows.recommendedUse: Equip the Assassin immediately and reserve the Gold for useful team upgrades and early area unlocks.

rows.methodOrUpgrade: Like the game and join Heroplay Studios
rows.recommendedUse: Activate this before starting a long farming session because the bonus improves both Gold income and hero rolls.
Farm enemies that your team defeats quickly instead of spending too long on a stronger target.

rows.requirement: Spend Gold in the upgrade system
rows.rewardOrEffect: Allows more heroes to join the active combat team
rows.recommendedUse: Prioritize a new slot when you already own a strong unequipped hero.

rows.rewardOrEffect: Improves the chance of rolling rarer and more powerful heroes
rows.recommendedUse: Increase Luck before committing to a large number of hero rolls.

rows.requirement: Pay the Gold requirement displayed at the area entrance
rows.rewardOrEffect: Opens another biome or zone with new progression targets
rows.recommendedUse: Buy the next area after your current team can clear nearby monsters without long delays.

rows.requirement: Spend Gold on the hero-size upgrade
rows.recommendedUse: Purchase after securing important Luck, team-slot, and area progression upgrades.

rows.requirement: Maintain a team that clears the current zone efficiently
rows.rewardOrEffect: Creates a repeatable cycle of higher Gold income and stronger hero rolls
rows.recommendedUse: Return to a faster area whenever progression slows, then upgrade the team before attempting the next zone again.

zonesBiomes.title: RNG Heroes Zones and Biomes Guide
zonesBiomes.intro: RNG Heroes uses a zone-based progression route. Each stage asks players to strengthen their active team, collect enough Gold for the next entrance, and decide whether advancing or continuing to farm the current area will produce faster progress.

zones.name: Tutorial and Starting Area
zones.mainRewards: Gold, XP, tutorial progress, and access to the Shop
objectives: Complete the tutorial
Roll and equip the first heroes
Learn how monster battles produce Gold and XP
Unlock the Shop and redeem Beginnings
zones.advanceWhen: The tutorial is complete, the Assassin reward is equipped, and the first enemies are being defeated quickly.

zones.name: Early Unlocked Biomes
zones.unlockRequirement: Purchase access with Gold at the area entrance
zones.mainRewards: Additional Gold and XP for upgrades, rolls, and later area gates
objectives: Fill every available hero slot
Replace weaker heroes with stronger rolls
Buy early Luck and equip-slot upgrades
Maintain fast monster clear times
zones.advanceWhen: The active team clears enemies consistently and the next area cost can be paid without using all upgrade funds.

zones.name: Mid-Progression Zones
zones.unlockRequirement: Continue purchasing zone access while improving the active team
zones.mainRewards: Higher progression income and access to more of the world
objectives: Roll rarer heroes
Expand the active team
Balance Luck upgrades with area unlock costs
Return to an earlier zone when battles become too slow
zones.advanceWhen: Current monsters fall at a reliable pace and the team has enough total strength to avoid stalled battles.

zones.name: Later Biomes
zones.unlockRequirement: Accumulate Gold through repeated monster farming and zone progression
zones.mainRewards: Late-game progression, stronger combat targets, and access toward the final area
objectives: Use the strongest available heroes
Keep all unlocked combat slots filled
Invest in Luck before extended rolling sessions
Farm the best zone that still provides quick defeats
zones.advanceWhen: The team can handle stronger monsters without lengthy downtime between rewards.

zones.name: Final Available Area
zones.unlockRequirement: Unlock the preceding areas and pay the final displayed entrance requirement
zones.mainRewards: Completion of the current zone route and access to the strongest available encounters
objectives: Reach the last area
Continue searching for extremely rare heroes
Optimize the active combat team
Prepare for future zones and updates
zones.advanceWhen: The current world route is complete and the remaining goal is improving hero rarity, team strength, and farming speed.

monstersCombat.title: RNG Heroes Monsters and Combat Guide
monstersCombat.intro: Monsters are the main repeatable source of Gold and XP in RNG Heroes. Faster defeats produce faster progression, so the most effective strategy is to equip the strongest heroes available, unlock additional team slots, and avoid remaining in a zone where each battle takes too long.

panels.title: Core Monster Battle Loop
panels.summary: Defeat monsters to collect Gold and XP, then use those rewards to strengthen the team and unlock more areas.
details: Roll heroes and equip the strongest available results.
Send the active team against monsters in the current zone.
Collect Gold and XP from completed fights.
Spend Gold on upgrades, additional slots, and area access.
Repeat the loop in progressively stronger biomes.

panels.title: Active Hero Team
panels.summary: Only equipped heroes contribute to the active combat group.
details: Keep every unlocked equip slot filled.
Replace weaker equipped heroes whenever a stronger roll is obtained.
Use additional equip-slot upgrades when strong heroes are waiting outside the active team.
Equip the Assassin from the Beginnings code during early progression.

panels.title: Hero Rarity and Strength
panels.summary: Rarer heroes provide the power needed to defeat stronger monsters and move through later zones.
details: Luck improves the chance of obtaining rare and powerful heroes.
The official gameplay loop is built around repeatedly rolling and collecting stronger heroes.
Extremely rare rolls can reach very large odds, including heroes displayed at one-in-a-trillion rarity.
Save Gold for Luck upgrades before performing extended rolling sessions.

panels.title: Starter-Area Monsters
panels.summary: The first enemies introduce the Gold-and-XP combat loop and are suitable for a new team.
details: Use these enemies while completing the tutorial and building the first full team.
Claim and equip the Assassin reward to improve early clear speed.
Remain here only while later-area enemies take substantially longer to defeat.

panels.title: Biome and Zone Monsters
panels.summary: Newly unlocked areas introduce stronger enemies that test the team's current progression.
details: Enter a new biome after purchasing its access requirement.
Compare the new clear speed with the previous area.
Continue in the new zone when battles remain efficient.
Return to the earlier area for Gold if the new enemies slow progression too much.

panels.title: Late-Zone Encounters
panels.summary: Later areas require stronger rolls, more active heroes, and better permanent upgrades.
details: Fill all available combat slots with the strongest heroes.
Improve Luck to increase access to rare heroes.
Use repeated Gold farming to fund the remaining zone gates.
Reach the final area only after the team can defeat preceding enemies reliably.

panels.title: Dragon Teaser
panels.summary: The official Roblox description includes a dragon icon followed by question marks.
details: The teaser appears alongside the game's monster, biome, and zone description.
Continue progressing through later areas and follow official update announcements for related content.

panels.title: Combat Preparation Checklist
panels.summary: Complete these steps before committing Gold to the next area.
details: Activate the +10% Gold and +1 Luck community bonus.
Equip the strongest hero in every available slot.
Use the Beginnings Assassin during early progression.
Purchase a useful team or Luck upgrade.
Confirm that current monsters are being defeated quickly.
Keep enough Gold for the next displayed area requirement.

updatesCommunity.title: RNG Heroes Updates and Community
updatesCommunity.intro: Heroplay Studios publishes the main game information through the official Roblox experience and community. Players should follow both pages to catch new content announcements and activate the permanent group-related Gold and Luck bonus.

events.headline: RNG Heroes Opens Its First Progression Route
events.details: The release introduces hero rolling, rare hero collection, monster battles, Gold and XP progression, and multiple unlockable biomes and zones.
events.playerAction: Complete the tutorial, assemble an active team, and begin unlocking areas.

events.headline: Beginnings Code Added
events.details: The Beginnings code grants 10,000 Gold and one Assassin hero after the tutorial unlocks the Shop.
events.playerAction: Open the Shop, scroll to the code field, enter Beginnings, and equip the Assassin.

events.headline: +10% Gold and +1 Luck Bonus
events.details: Liking the game and joining the Heroplay Studios Roblox community activates an additional Gold and Luck benefit.
events.playerAction: Join the official group before beginning a long farming or rolling session.

events.headline: Players Can Reach the Final Available Area
events.details: The current progression route supports repeated hero rolling and area unlocking until the last available zone is reached.
events.playerAction: Strengthen the active team and purchase each area entrance in sequence.

events.headline: New Heroes and Zones
events.details: Future progression additions can expand the hero pool, biome route, monsters, and late-game encounters.
events.playerAction: Follow the official Roblox experience and Heroplay Studios community for announcements.

events.headline: Limited Rewards and Community Milestones
events.details: New codes and event rewards can accompany game updates, milestones, and developer announcements.
events.playerAction: Check the Shop code field and official community posts after major updates.

events.headline: Progression and Gameplay Adjustments
events.details: Changes to heroes, Gold progression, Luck, zones, encounters, and technical issues are tracked through developer announcements.
events.playerAction: Review new announcements before spending a large amount of Gold or performing a long rolling session.

events.headline: Heroplay Studios Roblox Community
events.details: The official Roblox community connects players with the developer's games, announcements, and group-related rewards.
events.playerAction: Join Heroplay Studios and follow the RNG Heroes experience.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about RNG Heroes

questions.question: What is RNG Heroes?
questions.answer: RNG Heroes is a Roblox RNG hero collection simulator where you roll random heroes, defeat monsters for Gold and XP, upgrade your luck, and unlock new biomes and zones.

questions.question: How do I redeem RNG Heroes codes?
questions.answer: Complete the tutorial to unlock the Shop, open the Shop, scroll to the Codes section, enter the code with the exact capitalization shown, and press Redeem. Each code works once per Roblox account.

questions.question: What does the Beginnings code give in RNG Heroes?
questions.answer: The Beginnings code grants 10,000 Gold and one Assassin hero after you finish the tutorial and open the Shop. Equip the Assassin right away for a stronger early team.

questions.question: How does Luck work in RNG Heroes?
questions.answer: Luck improves your hero progression and helps you roll rarer, more powerful heroes. Spend Gold on Luck upgrades while your team can still clear enemies quickly, then pause when battles start to slow down.

questions.question: How many players can join an RNG Heroes server?
questions.answer: Each RNG Heroes server supports up to 12 players at the same time.

questions.question: Is RNG Heroes free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. RNG Heroes is a free Roblox experience, and you can launch it directly from the official Roblox game page.
